_comment: Author allowlist for the blog ingestion pipeline. Used by import-gists.sh, blog-batch.sh, and backfill_authors.py. Fields: id=canonical short key (lowercase, used as the `author` frontmatter value), github_login=GitHub username for gh api, display_name=shown on rendered posts, url=profile, gist_import=true means import-gists.sh auto-crawls public gists for files matching `*.blog.md` (opt-in convention); false means no automatic crawl (existing posts under content/posts/ are preserved either way).
